title: Mexican Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Mexican-inspired dish featuring chicken, pilaf, and spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter and the Thai red curry paste.
Add the pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the diced tomatoes and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the pilaf and tomatoes.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the pilaf is tender and the flavors have melded together.
